search_document:
User Request: Customer overview.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of customers by demographic categories
Title: Customers by Region
Type: table
Description: Number of customers segmented by region
Title: Total Number of Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Overall count of customers
Title: Customer Types Distribution
Type: chart
Description: Breakdown of customers by type
Title: Customer Growth Rate
Type: chart
Description: Trend of customer growth over time

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.description: Distribution of customers by demographic categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM CustomerDemographics cd LEFT JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ccd ON cd.CustomerTypeID = ccd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY cd.CustomerDesc

sql_queries.title: Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Number of customers segmented by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Region

sql_queries.title: Total Number of Customers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) AS TotalCustomers FROM Customers

sql_queries.title: Customer Types Distribution
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ccd.CustomerTypeID, cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM CustomerCustomerDemo ccd LEFT JOIN CustomerDemographics cd ON ccd.CustomerTypeID = cd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY ccd.CustomerTypeID, cd.CustomerDesc

sql_queries.title: Customer Growth Rate
sql_queries.description: Trend of customer growth over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS NewCustomers FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth
